case_title: CHARLES F MAYER VS. WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAYER, CHARLES F AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CHARLES MAYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC.IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYER, CHARLES F AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYER, CHARLES F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED APR-10-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC.
